front: What are the ICH guidelines for peptide drug product stability?
back: ICH Q1A(R2): Stability testing. Requirements: 1) Long-term (25°C/60% RH, 12-36 months), 2) Accelerated (40°C/75% RH, 6 months), 3) Stress conditions. For peptides: 4) Photostability (ICH Q1B), 5) In-use stability, 6) Freeze-thaw cycling. Critical: aggregation, deamidation, oxidation monitoring.
